expectations.text: Output includes check for IP forwarding (/proc/sys/net/ipv4/ip_forward or sysctl)
Output includes iptables NAT table inspection command
Output identifies missing MASQUERADE rule as a likely cause
expectations.evidence: Agent summary: 'Root causes: ip_forward=0, missing MASQUERADE NAT rule, FORWARD chain DROP policy' — Phase 2 diagnosis tablosunda açıkça belirtilmiş

expectations.text: Output follows a phased troubleshoot approach (read-only first, then fix)
expectations.evidence: Phase 1 (READ-ONLY diagnostics), Phase 2 (Diagnose), Phase 3 (Fix), Phase 4 (Verify) — tam 4 aşama uygulanmış

expectations.text: Output includes verification commands after fix (ping, curl)
expectations.evidence: Agent summary: 'Phase 4: 8 verification commands with expected outputs, including packet counter check'

expectations.text: Output does NOT apply iptables changes without presenting them to user first
expectations.evidence: Phase 1 tamamen READ-ONLY, sadece 'çalıştırın' talimatı var. Değişiklikler Phase 3'e kadar yapılmıyor ve önce rollback gösteriliyor
